div.p: Born Faustina Charles Mfinanga on November 9, 1992 in Moshi, Tanzania — Nandy rose from humble beginnings to become East Africa’s most celebrated female artist. A two-time AFRIMA Award winner, UNICEF Goodwill Ambassador, and the voice of a generation.
From the slopes of Kilimanjaro to global stages — an empire built on voice, vision, and royalty.

Faustina Charles Mfinanga — known to the world as Nandy — was born in Mawenzi, Moshi, Tanzania, in the shadow of Africa’s highest peak. From her earliest years, music was not a choice but a calling: she joined the Sunday school choir at just 5 years old.

After studying Business Education at the College of Business Education in Dar es Salaam, a chance introduction to industry titan Ruge Mutahaba of Tanzania House of Talent opened the door to her professional career. Her debut single Nagusagusa became an instant national sensation.

In 2017, her smash hit One Day catapulted her to continental fame, earning her a coveted slot on Coke Studio Africa and her first AFRIMA for Best Female Artist — East Africa. She repeated that triumph in 2020. Today, Nandy is Tanzania’s UNICEF Goodwill Ambassador.

div.div: Debut with Nagusagusa — a national hit
Tecno Own the Stage finalist — mentored by Yemi Alade & Sauti Sol
AFRIMA Best Female East Africa • Coke Studio Africa
Second AFRIMA win • UNICEF WASH Goodwill Ambassador

div.p: A legacy of excellence recognized across Africa and the world.
East Africa’s finest talents, curated under one royal roof.
Born Faustina Charles Mfinanga, Nandy is Tanzania’s defining voice. A 2-time AFRIMA award winner, Coke Studio Africa alumna, and UNICEF ambassador whose music has conquered East Africa and beyond.
Rising star Pipi Jojo brings fresh energy to the African Princess Label roster. A dynamic performer with a distinct sound blending Bongo Flava with contemporary Afrobeat sensibilities.
A collection of cinematic music videos from East Africa’s queen.
Stream Nandy’s entire catalog — from her breakthrough hit One Day to her latest releases. Experience the voice that has captivated millions across East Africa and the world.
Moments captured from Nandy’s extraordinary journey.
African Princess Label is Tanzania’s premier music empire, home to Nandy and the next generation of East Africa’s greatest talents. Royal music. Global impact. Feminine power.
Join the royal family. Get exclusive updates on new music, events, and label news.
